docket_entries.description: 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WONG, BRIAN AS TO DEFENDANT MENDOZA, HIUBERT
DECLARATION OF BRIAN WONG SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT. FILED BY PLAINTIFF WONG, BRIAN

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WONG, BRIAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MENDOZA, HIUBERT THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 234 LONDON STREET, UNIT D, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA 94112; SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MENDOZA, HIUBERT
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF WONG, BRIAN SERVED NOV-22-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MENDOZA, HIUBERT
UNLAWFUL DETAINER COVER SHEET (NO RENT DUE) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WONG, BRIAN AS TO DEFENDANT MENDOZA, HIUBERT
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF WONG, BRIAN SERVED NOV-09-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MENDOZA, HIUBERT
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT. AS TO DEFENDANT MENDOZA, HIUBERT
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE / $55 PER DAY FILED BY PLAINTIFF WONG, BRIAN
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WONG, BRIAN AS TO DEFENDANT MENDOZA, HIUBERT SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT MENDOZA, HIUBERT
